summary: Verified GPS button bug fix in FullScreenMapPicker component. The bug where pressing GPS button would close the modal and save location immediately has been FIXED. Now GPS button only shows user location on map, and modal stays open until user manually clicks 'تأكيد الموقع' (Confirm Location) button.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Fix verified in FullScreenMapPicker.js (lines 114-145): loadingRef used instead of loading as dependency to prevent useEffect re-runs
✅ handleBackButton now checks loadingRef.current and prevents popstate event during GPS loading
✅ Cleanup function no longer contains window.history.back() which was causing the modal to close
✅ GPS button (data-testid='gps-location-btn') correctly triggers getCurrentLocation() without closing modal
✅ Modal only closes via onClose() when user clicks 'رجوع' (Back) or handleConfirm() when clicking 'تأكيد الموقع' (Confirm)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All GPS button behavior tests passed

context_for_next_testing_agent: GPS button bug in FullScreenMapPicker has been fixed and verified. The fix involved: 1) Using loadingRef instead of loading state in useEffect dependencies, 2) Removing window.history.back() from cleanup function, 3) Preventing popstate events during GPS loading. Test flow: /join/seller → Register as seller → OTP verification → /seller/documents → Open map picker → Click GPS button → Verify modal stays open → Click on map to set location → Click 'تأكيد الموقع' → Verify modal closes and location is saved.

mocked_apis.SMS_OTP: MOCKED - Test mode enabled, use code 123456

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: When pressing GPS button in map picker modal, the modal would close and save location immediately instead of just showing user location on map
bug_fix_verification.expected_behavior: GPS button should only show user location on map, modal should stay open until user manually clicks 'تأكيد الموقع' (Confirm Location)

changes: Lines 116-119: Added loadingRef to track loading state without triggering useEffect re-runs
Lines 121-145: handleBackButton now checks loadingRef.current and prevents popstate during GPS loading
Removed window.history.back() from cleanup function that was causing modal to close

verification_results.test_1_gps_button_keeps_modal_open: PASS - Modal stays open after clicking GPS button
verification_results.test_2_confirm_button_closes_modal: PASS - Modal closes only when clicking 'تأكيد الموقع'
verification_results.test_3_location_saved_correctly: PASS - Location coordinates saved and displayed after confirmation
